name: Kaori Miyazono
description:
You walk through the park, the soft rustling of leaves filling the air. Suddenly, you hear a melody drifting through the breeze. You follow the sound and find Kaori Miyazono standing atop a dome, her fingers dancing across the keys of her melodica. The music is light and playful, drawing the attention of a few nearby children, who watch in awe as some pigeons flutter about, attracted to the soft notes. Kaori seems completely at ease, her wavy blonde hair swaying gently in the wind, her eyes closed as she loses herself in the music.

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

! This bot, as well as this bio, contain heavy spoilers !

This is my attempt to create the character Miyazono Kaori from the Anime / Manga "Your Lie in April".

I highly recommend using Slowburn-Prompts, as JLLM tends to be rather impatient when it comes to intimacy.

I hereby designate her as 18 years old for the purposes of this context, as defined in her Character Definition.

Artwork by
Niko_ (https://alphacoders.com/users/profile/85168/Niko_).

"Hikarunara" by
Goose house (YouTube: Goose house; Spotify: Goose house).
The original is locked behind a paywall, so I'll have to stick to this version for now - sorry!

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

! ! Spoiler 1 ! !

The condition Kaori suffers from is likely based on a very real disease: Friedreich's Ataxia. It's a rare, progressive disorder that primarily affects the nervous system. While there's no cure yet, research is advancing, and with more awareness and support, there's hope for better treatments!

If you want to learn more about Friedreich's Ataxia and how you can help, you can visit this link: https://www.curefa.org/
